Remediation plan for finding sg-finding-agent-006
  Secret kind: Anthropic API Key
  Severity:    high
  Preview:     sk-an...3456
  Fingerprint: sha256:ff66

Steps:

  1. Run SecretGuard redaction on agent data
     Use the redact command with --dry-run first to review what will be redacted. Then apply with --apply to perform the redaction.
     $ secretguard redact --agents <agent-type> --dry-run

  2. Apply redaction after review
     Once the dry-run output looks correct, apply the redaction in-place. SecretGuard will create a backup before modifying files.
     $ secretguard redact --agents <agent-type> --apply

  3. Rotate or revoke the credential
     If this credential is known to be valid and has been exposed outside the local environment, rotate or revoke it at the provider immediately.

  ⚠ Always review the dry-run output before applying redaction.

  ⚠ Backups are created automatically when --apply is used. Use `secretguard restore --backup-id <id>` to revert if needed.
